title: Trump Says U.S. Is Negotiating With Iran, Which Publicly Denies His Claim
summary_full: “Very, very strong talks,” President Trump claimed. Fake news, replied an Iranian parliamentary leader.
summary_public: “Very, very strong talks,” President Trump claimed. Fake news, replied an Iranian parliamentary leader.

IR.label: neutral
